targets.query:
from(bucket: "netmon")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "wifi_station" and r._field == "signal_dbm")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "netmon")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "wifi_station" and r._field == "frequency")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "netmon")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "wifi_station" and r._field == "tx_bitrate")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "netmon")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "wifi_station" and r._field == "rx_bitrate")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "netmon")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "wifi_station" and r._field == "signal_dbm")
  |> group(columns: ["ap_location"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "netmon")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "wifi_station" and (r._field == "tx_bitrate" or r._field == "rx_bitrate"))
  |> group(columns: ["ap_location", "_field"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "netmon")
  |> range(start: -30m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "wifi_channel_summary" and r._field == "ap_count")
  |> last()
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["channel"])

panels.title: AP Count per Channel Over Time
panels.description: Number of neighboring APs detected on each 2.4/5 GHz channel, sampled by the wifi-scanner. Proxy for channel congestion when the WiFi adapter does not expose nl80211 survey/busy counters. Current adapter (Realtek RTL8822BU / rtw_8822bu) does not expose them; an ath9k_htc-based dongle would activate the 'Channel Busy %' panel below.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "netmon")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "wifi_channel_summary" and r._field == "ap_count")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "channel", "band"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _field: "ch " + r.channel + " (" + r.band + ")" }))

from(bucket: "netmon")
  |> range(start: -30m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "wifi_scan_ap" and r._field == "signal_dbm")
  |> last()
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_value"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 50)

panels.title: Channel Busy % Over Time (survey-capable adapter only)
panels.description: Requires a WiFi adapter whose driver implements nl80211 NL80211_CMD_GET_SURVEY (e.g. ath9k_htc — TP-Link TL-WN722N v1, Alfa AWUS036NHA). Empty on the current Realtek RTL8822BU / rtw_8822bu. Auto-populates with no config change if survey-capable hardware is installed: wifi_scanner.py writes the wifi_channel.busy_pct measurement only when 'iw dev wlanN survey dump' returns channel-utilization counters.

defaults.noValue: no data — adapter driver does not expose nl80211 survey

targets.query:
from(bucket: "netmon")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "wifi_channel" and r._field == "busy_pct")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
